calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mei Hom, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Raymond Malfatti, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Steam and Plumbing Service Corporation.
Default entered against defendant on January 23, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on June 4, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Raymond Malfatti, and against the Defaulted Defendant Steam and Plumbing Service Corporation as follows:

Accrued Interest - $357.53.
Costs $200.00, for a total of $557.53.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
